title: SignalGuard AI — Compliant Content Reference Samples
description: 5 fully compliant marketing content pieces. Use as reference for the Resolver agent and for evaluation comparison.

samples.content: iPhone 17 Pro $0/mo w/ elig. trade-in (Apple/Samsung/Google, good cond.) on Unlimited Premium ($85.99/mo). 36-mo bill credits. Tax at purchase. novatel.com/t?utm_s=sms Msg&Data rates apply. STOP to opt out
compliance_notes: FTC-005: '$0/mo' immediately followed by trade-in requirement, eligible brands, plan name, and monthly cost
FTC-012: Trade-in brands and condition specified
BRAND-801: Plan name, monthly cost, and 36-mo credit period all in same SMS
FTC-014: 'Msg&Data rates may apply' included
BRAND-401: Terms URL included (novatel.com/t — short URL for SMS character limit)
FTC-014: Opt-out instructions included ('STOP to opt out')
BRAND-604: URL has UTM parameter for tracking
Fits within 160-character SMS limit (with standard encoding)

samples.content:
Subject: 4 lines, $25/line — your family plan, simplified

Hi [First Name],

Keeping your family connected shouldn't mean a complicated bill. With NovaTel's Unlimited Starter plan, you get 4 lines for $25/line per month ($100/mo total with AutoPay).

Each line includes unlimited talk, text, and data on our 5G network, plus 5GB of hotspot data. During busy times, data speeds on Unlimited Starter may temporarily slow — so everyone stays connected, even during peak hours.

Taxes, a $3.49/mo admin fee, and a $35/line activation fee apply. Video streams at 480p (DVD quality) on this plan tier.

See plans → novatel.com/family?utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=q2_family

Full terms and conditions: novatel.com/terms

— The NovaTel Team

You're receiving this because you opted in to NovaTel marketing emails. Unsubscribe: novatel.com/unsub
compliance_notes: BRAND-502: Tone is friendly, clear, savings-focused — appropriate for Consumer audience
FTC-018: Price includes AutoPay requirement, mentions taxes/fees/activation separately
FTC-007/BRAND-805: Deprioritization disclosed ('speeds may temporarily slow'), video resolution (480p), hotspot limit (5GB) all stated
BRAND-403: Full T&C link included, plan name stated, channel-appropriate length
BRAND-601: CTA 'See plans' is from approved list
BRAND-604: URL includes full UTM parameters
CAN-SPAM: Unsubscribe link included
Subject line under 60 characters
2-3 sentences per paragraph as required

samples.content:
Running a small business means wearing a lot of hats. Your wireless plan shouldn't add complexity.

NovaTel Business Unlimited Starter gives your team predictable monthly costs: $30/line for 5+ lines with AutoPay ($45/line for 1-4 lines). One bill, no surprises.

What each line gets:
• Unlimited talk, text, and data on NovaTel's 5G network
• 15GB hotspot data per line
• Data speeds may slow during congestion after 50GB/line

No IT team required to manage it. No long-term contracts.

Taxes, surcharges, and regulatory fees are extra. Business verification required at signup.

See how it works → novatel.com/business?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=q2_smb
compliance_notes: BRAND-503: Tone is practical, value-conscious, straight-talking — correct for Small Business Owner
BRAND-503: Acknowledges 'wearing many hats' — resonates with SMB audience
FTC-018: Both price tiers disclosed (5+ lines and 1-4 lines), AutoPay noted, taxes/fees called out
FTC-007/BRAND-805: Deprioritization threshold (50GB), hotspot limit (15GB) disclosed
BRAND-402: Short paragraphs with white space between — proper LinkedIn formatting
BRAND-602: 'See how it works' is from approved B2B CTA list
BRAND-604: Full UTM parameters on URL
No prohibited words used
No superlatives without citation
Under 150 words

samples.content:
Galaxy S26 for $0/mo when you trade in an eligible device (Apple, Samsung, Google, or Motorola — must power on) on Unlimited Extra ($75.99/mo w/ AutoPay).

$24.97/mo bill credits over 36 months. Credits stop if you cancel or change plans. Tax on full price at purchase.

On Unlimited Extra, data may slow during busy times after 75GB. Video streams at 720p. 30GB hotspot.

See the deal → novatel.com/galaxy?utm_source=facebook&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=q2_galaxy
compliance_notes: FTC-005: '$0/mo' with all conditions immediately adjacent — plan, cost, trade-in brands/condition, credit period
FTC-016: ALL material disclosures visible in initial Facebook post view without 'See More' click
FTC-012: Trade-in brands, condition ('must power on'), credit period, and credit-stop policy all disclosed
FTC-007/BRAND-805: Deprioritization (75GB), video resolution (720p), hotspot (30GB) all stated
BRAND-404: Under 250 words, no more than 3 emoji (zero used here for compliance safety)
BRAND-601: 'See the deal' is from approved CTA list
BRAND-604: Full UTM parameters
No superlatives, no prohibited words, no urgency tactics

samples.content:
NovaTel 5G Home Internet — Fast, Simple, Affordable

Replace your cable with NovaTel 5G Home Internet. Typical download speeds of 72-245 Mbps (Ookla Speedtest Intelligence, Q1 2026, across NovaTel 5G Home markets). No data caps. No annual contract.

Pricing:
• $25/mo with AutoPay when bundled with any NovaTel unlimited phone plan ($65.99+/mo)
• $50/mo standalone (no phone plan required)

What's included:
• 5G Gateway device (included at no extra cost — self-install in about 15 minutes)
• Unlimited home broadband with no data caps
• No annual contract — cancel anytime with no early termination fee

Availability: NovaTel 5G Home Internet is available in 200+ markets. Coverage and speeds vary by location. 4G LTE may be used where 5G is not available.

Check availability → novatel.com/home?utm_source=web&utm_medium=landing&utm_campaign=q2_home_internet

See full Broadband Facts label: novatel.com/broadband-facts
Full terms and conditions: novatel.com/terms
compliance_notes: BRAND-405: Headline is 7 words — under 10-word max
FTC-009/FTC-010: Speed claim uses 'typical' range (72-245 Mbps) with source (Ookla), date (Q1 2026), and scope (NovaTel 5G Home markets)
FTC-018: Both bundle price ($25) and standalone price ($50) clearly disclosed; phone plan requirement stated
BRAND-208: 'available in 200+ markets' — not 'everywhere' or 'nationwide'
BRAND-405: Disclosure in same viewport as pricing claim
FTC-010: Links to Broadband Facts label for full speed/price transparency
BRAND-601: 'Check availability' is a clear, descriptive CTA
BRAND-604: Full UTM parameters
Full T&C link included
No prohibited words, no superlatives, no urgency tactics
